privileged_info_summary: Task uses real Yahoo Finance MSFT daily OHLCV data spanning Jan 3, 2023 to Dec 31, 2024 (502 trading days total, 252 in 2024). Verified metadata: SampleMACrossover is a built-in NinjaTrader 8 strategy using 10-bar and 25-bar moving averages. SMA (Simple Moving Average) with period 50 is a valid NinjaTrader indicator. CONTRADICTION FOUND: Task metadata claims start_date '2024-01-01', but actual data starts 2024-01-02 (first trading day, as Jan 1 was a market holiday). End date verified as 2024-12-31. Expected output path uses standard NinjaTrader Documents directory structure but cannot be independently verified.
